raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, a third party contacted XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ( XXXX ) and requested financial information pertaining to my personal credit card. The third party also requested that all related information be sent to a new email address and a new phone number, all without my consent or knowledge. 

Subsequently, XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ( XXXX ) complied with the third partys request. They changed the contact information associated with my credit card on file and disclosed personal financial information to the third party. 

I possess the email chain and inquiry number, along with detailed notes, which substantiate these events. 

This incident constitutes a breach of my personal information. It highlights a significant security vulnerability in their procedures and indicates a severe lack of training among their employees.
